race.description: Thank You Crc Members Mdn Plate
race.comment: COMIC CULTURE (2) looks a handy acquisition for the Potter stable following some strong performances in Maiden grade in tougher company last campaign. His recent trial was solid and Budler remains in the saddle from that outing. Can make an immediate statement. HOLD MY DRINK (3) was very good on the new Illawarra Grange track at Kembla when only 2L off the winner in a provincial maiden. The in-form Keatings rides now and his racing pattern makes him very attractive on this surface. Can give them something to catch with improvement likely. ROSENBLUM (6) is on debut for the Seib stable and showed good ability at the trials. Boudvillain's booking is a big push for his chances and he can make an impact on debut. WAVE DANCER (10) has been around the mark recently and won't be far away once again. PURE OCTANE (5) gets the blinkers on for the first time today and can improve sharply.
